title: heart rods
description: Heart Rods from April Fools 2015's "The Love and Hugs Update" (15w14a)
body:
# Heart Rods

A resource pack that replaces the texture of swords with the Heart Rods' texture from 2015 April fools "The Love and Hugs Update" or Snapshot 15w14a.

An added art for netherite heart rod is included.

![heart rods shown being dropped on the floor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Y9ptdZLk/images/708a485ab8ac16dfd9973e569dcc130dcbf2345b.png)
